author: caniko
text: When refreshing token: JSON parse error - Expecting value: line 1 column 2 (char 1)

author: caniko
text:

author: davesque
text: If you believe you've identified a bug in the library, let me know about that. If you think this is due to a bug in your own code, I'm going to close this ticket for now since it's outside of the scope of this issues forum. Re-open if you think you've identified a bug in the library.

author: caniko
text:
I am trying to say that there is a bug in your code since it doesn't handle the error in an informal manner.

What does JSON parse error even mean? My JSON is structured correctly, and is in line with the application standard. The issue is somewhat similar to [#103](https://github.com/jazzband/djangorestframework-simplejwt/issues/103), but the error is different.
